docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF URIAS, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT DEL ROSARIO, CARLOS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA  ARCE'S GENERAL MAINTENANCE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URIAS, EDWIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEL ROSARIO, CARLOS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA  ARCE'S GENERAL MAINTENANCE $4,205.10 PRINCIPAL, $33.15 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,418.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED, JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTER COLLECTION BUREAU FILED BY PLAINTIFF URIAS, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT DEL ROSARIO, CARLOS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA  ARCE'S GENERAL MAINTENANCE

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF URIAS, EDWIN HEARING SET FOR NOV-13-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-13-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF EDWIN URIAS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Edwin Urias' motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and provide documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
